mapper.select: select id, type, target_id, last_message_id, last_message_preview, last_message_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at from cook_conversations where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null

select c.id, c.type, c.target_id, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_preview, c.last_message_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at from cook_conversations c inner join cook_conversation_members m1 on m1.conversation_id = c.id and m1.user_id = #{userId} and m1.status = 'normal' inner join cook_conversation_members m2 on m2.conversation_id = c.id and m2.user_id = #{targetUserId} and m2.status = 'normal' where c.type = 'private' and c.deleted_at is null limit 1

select c.id, c.type, c.target_id, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_preview, c.last_message_at, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at from cook_conversations c inner join cook_conversation_members cm on cm.conversation_id = c.id and cm.user_id = #{userId} and cm.status = 'normal' where c.type = 'notification' and c.target_id = #{userId} and c.deleted_at is null limit 1
mapper.update: update cook_conversations set last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_message_preview = #{preview}, last_message_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id} and deleted_at is null
